name: MISP IDS Attributes to IOC Collection
description: Periodically retrieves IDS-flagged attributes from a MISP instance and pushes them to a Sekoia.io IOC Collection

ioc_collection_uuid.description: UUID of the target IOC Collection in Sekoia.io format: ioc-collection--xxxxxxxx-xxxx-xxxx-xxxx-xxxxxxxxxxxx

lookback_days.description: Number of days to look back when retrieving attributes (e.g., '1' for last 1 day, '7' for last 7 days)

sleep_time.description: Time in seconds between polling cycles (minimum: 60 seconds)

verify_ssl.description: Whether to verify TLS certificates when connecting to MISP and Sekoia.io APIs. Disable only if using a self-signed certificate.

iocs_submitted.description: Number of IOCs successfully submitted to the Sekoia IOC Collection API

iocs_skipped_invalid.description: Number of IOCs skipped due to invalid format

attributes_processed.description: Total number of new MISP attributes processed in this cycle
